tickets.affected_task_title: BUG-020 — F23 bare vocabulary queries blocked by F19 intent guard
tickets.description: Add one re.compile entry to _PROPERTY_SEARCH_PATTERNS matching all 9 F23 vocabulary terms (新楼, 次新楼, 次新房, 较新, 新建, 近地铁, 靠近地铁, 地铁口, 步行到地铁). Do not modify _is_property_search function body or any existing pattern.
tickets.verification: docker compose exec -T backend python3 -c "import app.main; print('OK')"
